chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1834 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.04.2025 Petitioners are present in person Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi Assistant A.G Sindh a/w IO/SIP Narsingh <>*<> Investigation Officer has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her. Investigation Officer submits that based on the above statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Let such exercise be completed within two weeks. In the meanwhile petitioners shall be provided protection in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
